message: One of the best accomodation I have been. Very clean space and friendly staffs. Place is also safe, near Baranggay Hall, wet market and just 5 mins away from BGC. Place is very convenient to live in specially if working near BGC.
name: Ayen D.

message: Very worth it and not expensive 5 minutes walk in to market market and SM Aura especially to BGC ..every week to clean the house and all tenant is very friendly ..but one of my favorite to this bedspacio is free water and wifi...
name: Ernesto P.

message: The staffs are very accommodating and able to answer all of your questions or queries. The place is also near to bgc and malls which is convenient.
name: Rey A.

message: Very helpful and accomodating staffs. The price is reasonable and affordable. Perfect place for young professionals around metro
name: Eubert G.

message: Best spot for young pros! Friendly vibes, affordable prices, and walking distance from Market Market (just around 5 mins).
name: Benson A.
